bird.name: Turquoise tanager
bird.summary: The turquoise tanager (Tangara mexicana) is a medium-sized passerine bird in the tanager family Thraupidae. It is a resident bird from Trin…

locations.name: 墨西哥
locations.summary: 墨西哥合众国（西班牙語：Estados Unidos Mexicanos），通稱墨西哥（西班牙語：México），是北美洲南部的一个主权国家，北接美国，西濱太平洋，南鄰伯利兹、危地马拉，东面墨西哥湾。其领土面积达近198万平方公里，为美洲…

locations.name: 大西洋沿岸森林
locations.summary: 大西洋沿岸森林 （葡萄牙語：Mata Atlântica）是一片涵盖热带亚热带湿润阔叶林、热带亚热带干旱阔叶林、熱帶亞熱帶草地、稀樹草原和疏灌叢和红树林于一体的热带雨林保护区，位于巴西大西洋沿岸，最北到达北里约格朗德州，最南到达南里奥格兰…

relations.subject: Turquoise tanager
relations.evidence: Despite its scientific name, it is not found in Mexico

relations.subject: Turquoise tanager
relations.evidence: It was formerly treated as being conspecific with the white-bellied tanager which is found in the Atlantic Forest of eastern Brazil
